creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Outdated, if I'm not mistaken: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/11.4R/errata/>

<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/12.2R/errata/>

----

Glancing at recent posts under <https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-announce/2021-May/> and <https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-announce/2021-June/>, these two (and more) catch my eye: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/security/advisories/FreeBSD-SA-21:11.smap.asc>
<https://www.freebsd.org/security/advisories/FreeBSD-EN-21:17.libradius.asc>
